claims.formal_scope: exact rational and integer additive composition with budget guards, plus abstract DP mechanism model with composition lemma
blocking_gaps: RDP not yet formalized as a property of probability distributions over mechanisms
The (ε, δ) conversion from Rényi divergence is analytically documented but not fully formal
Mechanism composition lemma structure added but requires measure-theoretic completeness

claims.formal_scope: redundancy model and Chernoff-style exponential liveness bounds, plus union-bound probability composition
blocking_gaps: No full measure-theoretic probability space is formalized
Independence assumptions are stated abstractly but not axiomatized in Lean
The full stochastic convergence of hierarchical aggregation under failures is not formalized

claims.formal_scope: constant-size and constant-cost verifier model with soundness and completeness structure
blocking_gaps: No full Groth16 algebraic verification equation (pairing check) is formalized
No q-SDH security reduction is formalized
Abstract ZKStatement/Witness structures exist but lack connection to actual proof systems

claims.formal_scope: integer and rational convergence envelopes with exact regime characterization (1/(2KT) + ζ²) and monotonicity in round count
blocking_gaps: The full stochastic convergence theorem using measure theory is not formalized
No direct proof of O(1/√KT) rate; only O(1/KT) linear regime is established
Convergence under non-IID sampling with actual gradient concentration bounds remains unproven
